reviews.review_description: I bought relax River one along with  Dream Journey that came out the same time. Both have glitches were white lines go down the center of the screen.  Especially during night mode. Those should be fixed before you make another version I believe.
Could be more crisp and clear… but dang… this had me from the get go not knowing what to expect. A pleasant journey to be sure. Thanks devs! More dreams please.
Could not complain for the price, I thought it was great the fairies looked amazing and night time was quite creepy, would have liked it a bit longer but hey... good job keep it up! 👍
Fun Journey through an amazing world with animals and people of this surprising world. Very relaxing and beautiful. I really enjoy it. Thank you
I thought it was most excellent need more like this a very nice change
I absolutely love this game it’s so relaxing

A+--This film is very well done and very cool. One of the best games that has ever been released. Make more of this kind of games longer play time. Say like gnomes, trolls, alien abduction, hot air balloons. I was looking for more like this if you have time to make. A Christmas one (THE ELF ON THE SELF) THIS HAS ALOT OF POTENTIAL. Note to dev do you have more of this kind of videos if so leave feedback? This is on the meta quest site (ANY NAMES OF GAMES LEAVE TITLES.
